version.author: Israel Torres Mayoral
version.changelog:
[Changelog] - 2026-03-31 Visuals & Performance UI Modernization: Completely redesigned user interface for a cleaner, more professional, and modern aesthetic.
Code Optimization: Refactored core programming to enhance stability and ensure lower CPU consumption.
New Features & Tools Piano Roll Integration: Added a Piano Roll display to accurately visualize octaves across the frequency spectrum.
Enhanced Crosshair Data: The crosshair tool now displays the musical note (e.g., C#3) in real-time, providing immediate harmonic context alongside frequency data.
Loudness Metering (LUFS): Integrated three dedicated displays at the top for precise monitoring of LUFS-I, LUFS-S, and LUFS-M.
Phase Correlation Meter: Added a visual correlation tool for stereo imaging:
Green: Phase-coherent signal.
Red: Phase issues or cancellation detected.
